task_text: Hermes Commerce portfolio reconciliation: map every PRD capability to existing portfolio owner (Catering / Inventory / VIP / Cash & AR / Flyer / Multi-Location / backlog #23/#24/#25 / v3 #30/#32/#33/#34/#36) and decide what Commerce primitives own vs. what stays with existing agents. Lock the four shared primitives: commerce_catalog, commerce_cart, commerce_order_state, commerce_payment_link.
